title: BankParams
description: Typed view of a bank's SIMUL parameter block.

insert_position.description: Insert position relative to the loop (offset 0x01).

structure.description: Series vs parallel routing of the two effects (offset 0x00).

BankInsertPosition.description: Where the bank's effects sit relative to the insert loop. (`Insert Position`)

BankOutputMode.description: Output routing for the two effects. (`Output Mode`)

BankStructure.description: How the two effects are chained in SIMUL. (`Structure`)
